title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid
jsonLd.description:
IndiGrid, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!
